items.text: Audit Immunity for Trump Family Puts I.R.S. in a Bind
items.summary: Federal law prohibits the Internal Revenue Service from halting an audit at the direction of the president or his aides.
items.text_it: L'immunità di audit per la famiglia Trump mette in difficoltà l'I.R.S.
items.summary_it: La legge federale vieta all'Internal Revenue Service di interrompere un audit sotto la direzione del presidente o dei suoi collaboratori.

items.text: Mortgage Rates, Now 6.5%, Hit Highest Level Since War Began
items.summary: The average rate on a 30-year mortgage rose amid growing concerns over inflation and as the war with Iran showed no sign of ending.

items.text: People are putting less gas in their tanks as high prices crimp budgets, Walmart says
items.summary: “That’s an indication of stress,” Walmart’s CFO said, as Wall Street looks for signs of the Iran war’s impact on consumers.
